'''鈭歯g-ng-k''' ('''ngangaka''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wuzzle|wuzzle]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-ng-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wuzzle|wuzzle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯g-ng-k
|-
! Lemma
| ngangaka
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngangakithi|ngangakithi]] || [[word:ngangakiji|ngangakiji]] || [[word:ngangakishi|ngangakishi]] || [[word:ngangaki|ngangaki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngangakuthuth|ngangakuthuth]] || [[word:ngangakujuj|ngangakujuj]] || [[word:ngangakushush|ngangakushush]] || [[word:ngangak|ngangak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngangakuthu|ngangakuthu]] || [[word:ngangakuju|ngangakuju]] || [[word:ngangakushu|ngangakushu]] || [[word:ngangaku|ngangaku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngangakufuth|ngangakufuth]] || [[word:ngangakufuj|ngangakufuj]] || [[word:ngangakufush|ngangakufush]] || [[word:ngangakuf|ngangakuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngangakethe|ngangakethe]] || [[word:ngangakeje|ngangakeje]] || [[word:ngangakeshe|ngangakeshe]] || [[word:ngangake|ngangake]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngangakothoth|ngangakothoth]] || [[word:ngangakojoj|ngangakojoj]] || [[word:ngangakoshosh|ngangakoshosh]] || [[word:ngangak|ngangak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngangakotho|ngangakotho]] || [[word:ngangakojo|ngangakojo]] || [[word:ngangakosho|ngangakosho]] || [[word:ngangako|ngangako]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngangakofoth|ngangakofoth]] || [[word:ngangakofoj|ngangakofoj]] || [[word:ngangakofosh|ngangakofosh]] || [[word:ngangakof|ngangakof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngangak忙th忙|ngangak忙th忙]] || [[word:ngangak忙j忙|ngangak忙j忙]] || [[word:ngangak忙sh忙|ngangak忙sh忙]] || [[word:ngangak忙|ngangak忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngangakathath|ngangakathath]] || [[word:ngangakajaj|ngangakajaj]] || [[word:ngangakashash|ngangakashash]] || [[word:ngangak|ngangak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngangakatha|ngangakatha]] || [[word:ngangakaja|ngangakaja]] || [[word:ngangakasha|ngangakasha]] || [[word:ngangaka|ngangaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngangakafath|ngangakafath]] || [[word:ngangakafaj|ngangakafaj]] || [[word:ngangakafash|ngangakafash]] || [[word:ngangakaf|ngangakaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:ngangakasha|ngangakasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gongangakasha|gongangakasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokingangakasha|gokingangakasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:ngangakn眉sha|ngangakn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gongangaknkn眉sha|gongangaknkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokingangakn眉sha|gokingangakn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngangaksh毛sha|ngangaksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongangaknksh毛sha|gongangaknksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingangaksh毛sha|gokingangaksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngangakrosha|ngangakrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongangaknkrosha|gongangaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingangakrosha|gokingangakrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngangakmusha|ngangakmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gongangaknkmusha|gongangaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingangakmusha|gokingangakmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:ngangaksherasha|ngangaksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gongangaknksherasha|gongangaknksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokingangaksherasha|gokingangaksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:ngangakngasha|ngangakngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gongangaknkngasha|gongangaknkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokingangakngasha|gokingangakngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngangakyasha|ngangakyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gongangaknkyasha|gongangaknkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokingangakyasha|gokingangakyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:ngangakyamasha|ngangakyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gongangaknkyamasha|gongangaknkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokingangakyamasha|gokingangakyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:ngangakn眉sh毛sha|ngangakn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gongangaknkn眉sh毛sha|gongangaknkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokingangakn眉sh毛sha|gokingangakn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngangakn眉rosha|ngangakn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongangaknkn眉rosha|gongangaknkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingangakn眉rosha|gokingangakn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngangakn眉musha|ngangakn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongangaknkn眉musha|gongangaknkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingangakn眉musha|gokingangakn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:ngangaksh毛n眉sha|ngangaksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gongangaknksh毛n眉sha|gongangaknksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokingangaksh毛n眉sha|gokingangaksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngangaksh毛rosha|ngangaksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongangaknksh毛rosha|gongangaknksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingangaksh毛rosha|gokingangaksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngangaksh毛musha|ngangaksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongangaknksh毛musha|gongangaknksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingangaksh毛musha|gokingangaksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:ngangakron眉sha|ngangakron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gongangaknkron眉sha|gongangaknkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokingangakron眉sha|gokingangakron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:ngangakrosh毛sha|ngangakrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gongangaknkrosh毛sha|gongangaknkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokingangakrosh毛sha|gokingangakrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngangakromusha|ngangakromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongangaknkromusha|gongangaknkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingangakromusha|gokingangakromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:ngangakmun眉sha|ngangakmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gongangaknkmun眉sha|gongangaknkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokingangakmun眉sha|gokingangakmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:ngangakmush毛sha|ngangakmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gongangaknkmush毛sha|gongangaknkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokingangakmush毛sha|gokingangakmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngangakmurosha|ngangakmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongangaknkmurosha|gongangaknkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingangakmurosha|gokingangakmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:ngangak|ngangak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ng忙ng忙k|ng忙ng忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hongangak|hongangak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hong忙ng忙k|hong忙ng忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohongangak|hohongangak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohong忙ng忙k|hohong忙ng忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉ngangak|n眉ngangak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉ng忙ng忙k|n眉ng忙ng忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉ngangak|n眉n眉ngangak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉ng忙ng忙k|n眉n眉ng忙ng忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂ngangak|n茂ngangak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂ng忙ng忙k|n茂ng忙ng忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂ngangak|n茂n茂ngangak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂ng忙ng忙k|n茂n茂ng忙ng忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lungangak|lungangak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lung忙ng忙k|lung忙ng忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulungangak|lulungangak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulung忙ng忙k|lulung忙ng忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lingangak|lingangak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ling忙ng忙k|ling忙ng忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilingangak|lilingangak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liling忙ng忙k|liling忙ng忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kongangak|kongangak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kong忙ng忙k|kong忙ng忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokongangak|kokongangak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokong忙ng忙k|kokong忙ng忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kengangak|kengangak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:keng忙ng忙k|keng忙ng忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekengangak|kekengangak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeng忙ng忙k|kekeng忙ng忙k]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
